働く.mnemonics: Sounds like 'ha-ta-laku.' Imagine working hard while saying 'Ha! Tackle this work!'

太る.mnemonics: Sounds like 'futo-ru.' Imagine gaining weight and saying 'Futo, I grew!'

english: to be on the heavy side/overweight
太っています.mnemonics: Sounds like 'futo-tte-mass.' Picture someone who's heavy saying, 'Futo, I'm mass!'

眼鏡を掛ける.mnemonics: Sounds like 'may-gah-neh-wo-kakeru.' Imagine putting on glasses to see the month of May clearly.

english: to put on clothes above your waist
着る.mnemonics: Sounds like 'keer.' Picture 'keering' a shirt over your head.

痩せる.mnemonics: Sounds like 'ya-sell.' Imagine losing weight and saying, 'Ya, I can sell my old clothes now!'

痩せています.mnemonics: Sounds like 'ya-set-te-mass.' Picture a thin person saying, 'Ya, I'm set with this mass!'

結婚する.mnemonics: Sounds like 'kett-kon-suru.' Picture getting married and setting a 'ket' (contract) to connect lives.

何も.mnemonics: Sounds like 'nani mo.' Picture saying 'Nani? Mo nothing?'

～人.mnemonics: Sounds like 'neen.' Imagine counting people and saying 'One neen, two neen...'

一人.mnemonics: Sounds like 'hitori.' Picture being alone and saying 'Hi, I'm just one here.'

二人.mnemonics: Sounds like 'futari.' Think of 'two' (fu-ta-ri) people standing together.

別に.mnemonics: Sounds like 'bet-su-ni.' Imagine shrugging and saying 'Bet, it's nothing special.'

勿論.mnemonics: Sounds like 'mochi-ron.' Picture saying 'Of course!' while eating mochi.

english: to put on items below your waist
はく.mnemonics: Sounds like 'huck.' Think of 'hucking' on your pants or shoes.

～が.mnemonics: Think of it as a pause, like saying 'ga...' when you're about to say 'but...'

よかったら.mnemonics: Sounds like 'yokatta-ra.' Imagine saying, 'If you like (yokatta), then ra (come on)!'
